text: You wake up in a cold bedroom. You hear rain. You see raindrops on the window. You hear birds. You go downstairs. Dinner is cold. You eat it anyway. You think about school. You drink milk. You read. You think. You fall asleep. You dream. You wake up sad. You make cookies. You eat them. You go back to bed. You think. You dream about friends. You wake up. You see frogs. You laugh.
